title: Sergio Solomons selected for UK tour
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Sergio Solomons, a resident of Sedgefield and a learner at Knysna High School, has been selected to join the Travel and Sport Invitational U15 rugby team on an international tour to England and Wales from 12 to 13 December.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Sergio Solomons, a resident of Sedgefield and a learner at Knysna High School, has been selected to join the Travel and Sport Invitational U15 rugby team on an international tour to England and Wales from 12 to 13 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This exciting opportunity comes after Sergio's outstanding performance at the recent Kwagga Junior Rugby Week, where he showcased exceptional skill on the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sergio's father, Vernon Solo-mons, expressed the family's pride in his son's achievement: \"This is a great opportunity for him to be exposed to different cultures and to measure himself against players from abroad. While we have been busy with many fundraisers to make this rugby tour possible for him, much still needs to be done and any assistance will be helpful.\"","html":"Sergio's father, Vernon Solo-mons, expressed the family's pride in his son's achievement: \"This is a great opportunity for him to be exposed to different cultures and to measure himself against players from abroad. While we have been busy with many fundraisers to make this rugby tour possible for him, much still needs to be done and any assistance will be helpful.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cost of the tour amounts to R55 990. Anyone who wishes to support Sergio in making this dream a reality can contact his father on 072 348 7822.","html":"The cost of the tour amounts to R55 990. Anyone who wishes to support Sergio in making this dream a reality can contact his father on 072 348 7822."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sergio Solomons selected for UK tour
